infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ClipScript needs camera access to film your teleprompter videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ClipScript needs microphone access to record audio with your videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ClipScript saves your filmed videos to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: ClipScript needs camera access to film your teleprompter videos.
plugins.microphonePermission: ClipScript needs microphone access to record audio.

plugins.photosPermission: ClipScript needs access to your photo library to save videos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: ClipScript needs permission to save videos to your library.
